title: psidium niveum
intro: Psidium niveum, also known as the snow white guava, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Psidium niveum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other topical applications for therapeutic purposes.
